TWR360Audiotwr360

Portuguese is a Western Romance language of the Indo-European language family originating from the Iberian Peninsula of Europe. It is spoken chiefly in Portugal, in Brazil, and in several African countries, as well as by immigrants in North America, Europe, and South America. With approximately 267 million speakers, it is listed as the fifth-most spoken native language.

TWR360Audiotwr360

Portuguese is a Western Romance language of the Indo-European language family originating from the Iberian Peninsula of Europe. It is spoken chiefly in Portugal, in Brazil, and in several African countries, as well as by immigrants in North America, Europe, and South America. With approximately 267 million speakers, it is listed as the fifth-most spoken native language.

TWR360Áudiotwr360

Portuguese is a Western Romance language of the Indo-European language family originating from the Iberian Peninsula of Europe. It is spoken chiefly in Portugal, in Brazil, and in several African countries, as well as by immigrants in North America, Europe, and South America. With approximately 267 million speakers, it is listed as the fifth-most spoken native language.

Portuguese is a Western Romance language of the Indo-European language family originating from the Iberian Peninsula of Europe. It is spoken chiefly in Portugal, in Brazil, and in several African countries, as well as by immigrants in North America, Europe, and South America. With approximately 267 million speakers, it is listed as the fifth-most spoken native language.

TWR360ऑडियोtwr360

Portuguese is a Western Romance language of the Indo-European language family originating from the Iberian Peninsula of Europe. It is spoken chiefly in Portugal, in Brazil, and in several African countries, as well as by immigrants in North America, Europe, and South America. With approximately 267 million speakers, it is listed as the fifth-most spoken native language.

TWR360صوتياتtwr360

Portuguese is a Western Romance language of the Indo-European language family originating from the Iberian Peninsula of Europe. It is spoken chiefly in Portugal, in Brazil, and in several African countries, as well as by immigrants in North America, Europe, and South America. With approximately 267 million speakers, it is listed as the fifth-most spoken native language.

TWR360音声twr360

Portuguese is a Western Romance language of the Indo-European language family originating from the Iberian Peninsula of Europe. It is spoken chiefly in Portugal, in Brazil, and in several African countries, as well as by immigrants in North America, Europe, and South America. With approximately 267 million speakers, it is listed as the fifth-most spoken native language.

TWR360오디오twr360

Portuguese is a Western Romance language of the Indo-European language family originating from the Iberian Peninsula of Europe. It is spoken chiefly in Portugal, in Brazil, and in several African countries, as well as by immigrants in North America, Europe, and South America. With approximately 267 million speakers, it is listed as the fifth-most spoken native language.

首页语言葡萄牙语

TWR360音频twr360

Portuguese is a Western Romance language of the Indo-European language family originating from the Iberian Peninsula of Europe. It is spoken chiefly in Portugal, in Brazil, and in several African countries, as well as by immigrants in North America, Europe, and South America. With approximately 267 million speakers, it is listed as the fifth-most spoken native language.

About Countries Organizations Collections Search

Find a Bible is a collaborative project of the Forum of Bible Agencies and is created and maintained by the Digital Bible Society.

Acerca de Países Organizaciones Colecciones Buscar

«Find a Bible» es un proyecto colaborativo del Forum of Bible Agencies, creado y mantenido por la Digital Bible Society.

Sobre Países Organizações Coleções Pesquisar

«Find a Bible» é um projeto colaborativo do Forum of Bible Agencies, criado e mantido pela Digital Bible Society.

À propos Pays Organisations Collections Rechercher

«Find a Bible» est un projet collaboratif du Forum of Bible Agencies, créé et maintenu par la Digital Bible Society.

परिचय देश संगठन संग्रह खोजें

«Find a Bible» Forum of Bible Agencies की एक सहयोगी परियोजना है, जिसे Digital Bible Society द्वारा बनाया और संचालित किया जाता है।

حول البلدان المنظمات المجموعات بحث

«Find a Bible» مشروع تعاوني تابع لـ Forum of Bible Agencies، وقد أنشأته وتتولى صيانته Digital Bible Society.

概要 国 団体 コレクション 検索

「Find a Bible」は Forum of Bible Agencies の共同プロジェクトであり、Digital Bible Society が制作・運営しています。

소개 국가 단체 모음 검색

〈Find a Bible〉는 Forum of Bible Agencies의 공동 프로젝트이며, Digital Bible Society가 제작·운영합니다.

关于 国家 机构 收藏 搜索

「Find a Bible」是 Forum of Bible Agencies 的合作项目，由 Digital Bible Society 创建并维护。
